mapper.sql: select rule_id, rule_name, rule_type, alert_level, threshold_value, compare_operator, scope_type, scope_value, notify_enabled, notify_channels, notify_roles, notify_silence_hours, enabled, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from proj_alert_rule
mapper.select: where enabled = '1' order by rule_type asc, cast(alert_level as unsigned) desc, rule_id asc
mapper.insert: insert into proj_alert_rule(rule_name, rule_type, alert_level, threshold_value, compare_operator, scope_type, scope_value, notify_enabled, notify_channels, notify_roles, notify_silence_hours, enabled, remark, create_by, create_time) values(#{ruleName}, #{ruleType}, #{alertLevel}, #{thresholdValue}, #{compareOperator}, #{scopeType}, #{scopeValue}, #{notifyEnabled}, #{notifyChannels}, #{notifyRoles}, #{notifySilenceHours}, #{enabled}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now())
mapper.update: update proj_alert_rule set rule_name = #{ruleName}, rule_type = #{ruleType}, alert_level = #{alertLevel}, threshold_value = #{thresholdValue}, compare_operator = #{compareOperator}, scope_type = #{scopeType}, scope_value = #{scopeValue}, notify_enabled = #{notifyEnabled}, notify_channels = #{notifyChannels}, notify_roles = #{notifyRoles}, notify_silence_hours = #{notifySilenceHours}, enabled = #{enabled}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where rule_id = #{ruleId}
update proj_alert_rule set enabled = #{enabled}, update_by = #{username}, update_time = now() where rule_id = #{ruleId}
mapper.delete: delete from proj_alert_rule where rule_id in #{ruleId}
